commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Son of man, speak to the children of your people, and say unto them, When I bring the sword upon a land, if the people of the land take a man from their territory, and set him for their watchman: Take. Before (chap. ) God made the choice, (Calmet) as he does here, ver. He confirms the authority of those who are appointed to govern. Literally, "last "(Haydock) which seems to denote such as are chosen without regard to their dignity or obscurity in life, Genesis xlvii. , and 3 Kings xii. (Calmet) Pastors are not excused from admonishing the people for fear of danger or despair of reclaiming them, as each one is bound to do his duty. Jerome) (Worthington).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
